name: api_openai_gpt_image_2_image_edit
description: OpenAI GPT Image 2 via the OpenAIGPTImage1 API node — image-edit variant. Takes one reference image plus a text instruction and returns an edited image. Image size is parameterizable via the top-level aspect_ratio argument (default baked into the workflow is 1024x1024). GPT Image 2 currently delivers three documented sizes (1024x1024, 1536x1024, 1024x1536); the shared 10-label aspect_ratio vocabulary is mapped to the nearest of those (e.g. '4:3', '16:9' and '21:9' all resolve to 1536x1024). Runs against the local ComfyUI server (Comfy Cloud does not yet ship gpt-image-2); requires an OpenAI API key configured in your local ComfyUI installation.

prompt.description: Text instruction describing how the reference image should be edited or transformed.

quality.description: Render quality tier. One of 'low', 'medium', 'high', or 'auto'. Higher tiers cost more against your OpenAI account.
